description: CompositionBlue creased and washed denim capris made of 100% cotton, has two side pockets with one coin pocket, two back pockets with embroidery, stitch detailing, zipped and buttoned closure with a crystal embellishment and a comfortable waistband with belt loopsFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry lowDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsChoose these blue denim capris from doodle for a summery, comfortable, casual option, perfect for girls. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals for a stylish, active look,
